name: openEuler sig-CloudNative SIG
description: CloudNative SIG is committed to providing a convenient and easy-to-use cloud native infrastructure for users, developers, and enthusiasts, providing a simple and efficient cloud native application development hosting environment to build cloud native ecology.

name: openEuler sig-CloudNative SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-CloudNative SIG maintains 138 repositories in the Cloud Computing and Containers domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-CloudNative SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for CloudNative SIG is committed to providing a convenient and easy-to-use cloud native infrastructure for users, developers, and enthusiasts, providing a simple and efficient cloud native application development hosting environment to build cloud native ecology.. The SIG has 42 core members and maintains 138 repositories in the Cloud Computing and Containers domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-CloudNative SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-CloudNative SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at cloudnative@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-CloudNative SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-CloudNative SIG maintains 138 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-CloudNative.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-CloudNative SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-CloudNative SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Zhao Yang, Wang Jianmin, Baohui Wei. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
